tiktok_script:

It maps out a realistic path to building income alongside whatever you're already doing — no guesswork, no gatekeeping. And right now it's completely free. Zero dollars.

BEAT 3 — Why Now (50-70s): No subscription. No catch. Just download it and it's yours to keep forever. Start on step one this weekend. That's all I'm asking.

CTA (70-85s): Link is in my bio. Go to smarterhustleacademy.com/start and grab your free copy right now. Free Win Friday — let's go.
